positive: A stylized minimalist forest scene. The main subject is a group of whimsical, geometric woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl) silhouetted against a vibrant, ethereal sunset sky. The forest floor is rendered with clean, graphic lines and deep contrasting tones (teal, sapphire blue, burnt orange). Focus on clean, negative space around the subjects, emphasizing the silhouette quality. The composition must be centrally focused and symmetrical, perfect for apparel printing. Style: Scandinavian folk art meets modern vector illustration. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic rim lighting on the edges of the creatures. Detail: Use a limited, harmonious color palette (only 3-4 main colors) to ensure print readability. Aspect ratio: Square and balanced.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, blurry, low resolution, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, malformed limbs, extra fingers, gradient, oil painting, photorealism, sketch, anime, cartoon, grayscale
